final_prompt.prompt:
Create a short-video vertical cover image for a gaming monitor product launch.

Style/medium: needs a minimalist, premium aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use rule-of-thirds layout with large, eye-catching headline typography as dominant element
Subject: must include the GGU gaming monitor as hero product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-end, dramatic atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz" as main headline; must include "全球首发全新面板 低延迟 完美色彩" as subtitle
Constraints: must preserve vertical (9:16) format; headline must be oversized and visually dominant
Avoid:
